description: Lock immunology_advanced to postwar immune-tolerance, graft-rejection, and cellular/molecular immunology rather than generic infection treatment or vaccine administration.

checks.reason: The corrected scope is anchored to the 1953 Nature acquired-tolerance paper.
Vaccination is immune-protection lineage, not a direct experimental method required by the 1953 tolerance anchor.
Clinical medicine provides disease, graft, and treatment context but is not a single component of immunological-tolerance theory.
Biochemical life-science methods support molecular immune mechanisms without replacing the immunology-specific discovery scope.
Antibiotics are antibacterial treatment, not a direct prerequisite for acquired immune tolerance or graft-rejection immunology.
